title: Fishhead
description: Have you ever wanted to be a horse? Well we don't know much about horses actually, but we can help you become one with the fish! This mod lets you wear pufferfish.
body:
This mod lets you wear a pufferfish on your head. Yeah. It was vaguely inspired by those silly horse masks.

This mod was made for ModFest 1.20.4.

(Do not use this mod in production. The code is really bad. It is extremely jank. Please do not take this mod seriously. Expect plenty of glitches.)
